zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Abernethy於大約1289年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內時，她的父親Alexander de Abernethy19歲，母親Margaret de Menteith15歲。她於大約1302年與Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1355年11月19日在蘇格蘭費伏格朗 本 林多雷斯享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏林多雷斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Abernethy于大约1289年出生在苏格兰培爾阿波內时，她的父亲Alexander de Abernethy19岁，母亲Margaret de Menteith15岁。她于大约1302年与Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1355年11月19日在苏格兰費伏格朗 本 林多雷斯享年67岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏林多雷斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Abernethy was born about 1289, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander de Abernethy, was 19 and her mother, Margaret de Menteith, was 15. She married Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie about 1302, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 November 1355, in Grange of Lindores, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Lindores Abbey, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Abernethy est née environ 1289, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander de Abernethy, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Menteith, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie environ 1302, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1355, à Grange of Lindores, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Lindores Abbey, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Abernethy um 1289 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander de Abernethy 19 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Menteith 15. Sie hat um 1302 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. November 1355 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Grange of Lindores, Fife, Scotland und wurde in Lindores Abbey, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Abernethy è nata il circa 1289 nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander de Abernethy, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Menteith, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie circa 1302, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 novembre 1355, nel Grange of Lindores, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Lindores Abbey, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Abernethyが約1289年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで生まれた時，父Alexander de Abernethyは19歳，母Margaret de Menteithは15歳であった。約1302年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでAndrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1355年11月19日にスコットランドフィフグランッジ オフ リンドアスで67歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフリンドアス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Abernethy(이)가 대략 1289년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander de Abernethy(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Menteith(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1302년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 11월 19일 스컷랜드 피프 그랑 프 린도어스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 린도어스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie aproximadamente 1302, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1355, em Grange of Lindores, Fife, Scotland, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Lindores Abbey, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Abernethy родилась около 1289 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander de Abernethy было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Menteith, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie около 1302 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 ноября 1355 г. в местности гранг оф линдоресь, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности линдоресь эбби, фиф, Шотландия.

es.Lindores Abbey, Fifeshire, Scotland: Lindores Abbey, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Abernethy nació aproximadamente 1289, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander de Abernethy, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret de Menteith, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie aproximadamente 1302, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1355, en Grange of Lindores, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Lindores Abbey, Fife, Scotland.
